results.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_users FROM identity.users

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM catalog.products 
WHERE is_active = true

SELECT DISTINCT geo.currencies.code
FROM geo.currencies

SELECT COUNT(*) AS refunded_order_count
FROM sales.orders
WHERE status = 'refunded'

SELECT AVG(grand_total) AS average_grand_total
FROM sales.orders

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM support.tickets 
WHERE priority = 'urgent'
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM sales.orders

SELECT SUM(billing.payments.amount) AS total_captured_payments
FROM billing.payments
WHERE billing.payments.status = 'captured'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM catalog.products 
WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM billing.subscriptions 
WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM geo.countries 
WHERE continent = 'Europe'

SELECT AVG(employee_count) AS average_employee_count
FROM crm.accounts
WHERE employee_count IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS sign_up_count
FROM identity.users
WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_ticket_count
FROM support.tickets
WHERE status = 'open'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM billing.invoices 
WHERE due_at < NOW() AND status != 'paid'

SELECT catalog.products.name AS product_name, catalog.brands.name AS brand_name
FROM catalog.products
JOIN catalog.brands ON catalog.products.brand_id = catalog.brands.id

SELECT 
    catalog.product_reviews.id AS review_id,
    catalog.product_reviews.rating,
    catalog.product_reviews.title AS review_title,
    catalog.product_reviews.body AS review_body,
    catalog.products.name AS product_name
FROM 
    catalog.product_reviews
JOIN 
    catalog.products ON catalog.product_reviews.product_id = catalog.products.id

SELECT 
    billing.subscriptions.id AS subscription_id,
    billing.plans.name AS plan_name
FROM 
    billing.subscriptions
JOIN 
    billing.plans ON billing.subscriptions.plan_id = billing.plans.id

SELECT sales.orders.id AS order_id, identity.users.email AS user_email
FROM sales.orders
JOIN identity.users ON sales.orders.user_id = identity.users.id

SELECT p.id, p.name
FROM catalog.products p
LEFT JOIN catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE pr.id IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscribers
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE plan_id IN (
    SELECT id FROM billing.plans WHERE name = 'Pro' AND is_active = true
) AND status = 'active'

SELECT 
    currency_code, 
    SUM(grand_total) AS total_revenue 
FROM 
    sales.orders 
GROUP BY 
    currency_code

SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY tenant_id

SELECT p.id, p.name, AVG(r.rating) AS average_rating
FROM catalog.products p
JOIN catalog.product_reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING AVG(r.rating) > 4

SELECT identity.users.id, identity.users.full_name, COUNT(sales.orders.id) AS order_count
FROM identity.users
JOIN sales.orders ON identity.users.id = sales.orders.user_id
GROUP BY identity.users.id
HAVING COUNT(sales.orders.id) > 3

SELECT 
    geo.countries.name AS shipping_country,
    SUM(sales.orders.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    sales.orders
JOIN 
    geo.addresses AS shipping_address ON sales.orders.shipping_address_id = shipping_address.id
JOIN 
    geo.countries ON shipping_address.country_id = geo.countries.id
GROUP BY 
    geo.countries.name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT 
    catalog.products.id AS product_id,
    catalog.products.name AS product_name,
    SUM(sales.order_items.quantity) AS total_units_sold
FROM 
    sales.order_items
JOIN 
    catalog.products ON sales.order_items.product_variant_id = catalog.product_variants.id
GROUP BY 
    catalog.products.id
ORDER BY 
    total_units_sold DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT DISTINCT identity.users.email
FROM sales.gift_card_transactions
JOIN identity.users ON sales.gift_card_transactions.issued_to_user_id = identity.users.id
WHERE sales.gift_card_transactions.amount < 0
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT identity.users.email
FROM sales.return_items
JOIN sales.orders ON sales.return_items.order_id = sales.orders.id
JOIN identity.users ON sales.orders.user_id = identity.users.id
WHERE sales.return_items.refund_amount > 0
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT identity.users.email
FROM billing.payment_refunds
JOIN identity.users ON billing.payment_refunds.payment_id = billing.payments.id
JOIN billing.payments ON billing.payment_refunds.payment_id = billing.payments.id
WHERE billing.payment_refunds.amount > 0

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT geo.addresses.user_id) AS user_count
FROM geo.addresses
WHERE geo.addresses.country_id = (SELECT id FROM geo.countries WHERE name = 'Germany')

SELECT bp.code AS plan_code, COUNT(s.id) AS active_subscription_count
FROM billing.plans AS bp
LEFT JOIN billing.subscriptions AS s ON bp.id = s.plan_id AND s.status = 'active'
GROUP BY bp.code

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', o.placed_at) AS month,
    COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM 
    sales.orders o
WHERE 
    o.placed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month

SELECT 
    identity.tenants.id AS tenant_id,
    SUM(sales.orders.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    identity.tenants
LEFT JOIN 
    sales.orders ON identity.tenants.id = sales.orders.tenant_id
GROUP BY 
    identity.tenants.id
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - created_at)) / 86400) AS average_days_to_resolve
FROM support.tickets
WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders o
JOIN identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE o.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(pc.product_id) AS product_count
FROM catalog.categories c
LEFT JOIN catalog.product_categories pc ON c.id = pc.category_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY product_count DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT SUM(sales.orders.grand_total) AS total_revenue_eur
FROM sales.orders
WHERE sales.orders.currency_code = 'EUR'

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(*) AS cancelled_order_fraction
FROM 
    sales.orders

SELECT *
FROM crm.accounts
WHERE employee_count > 100

SELECT 
    billing.plans.name AS plan_name,
    AVG(sales.orders.grand_total) AS average_order_value
FROM 
    sales.orders
JOIN 
    billing.subscriptions ON sales.orders.user_id = billing.subscriptions.user_id
JOIN 
    billing.plans ON billing.subscriptions.plan_id = billing.plans.id
GROUP BY 
    billing.plans.name

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS paid_invoices_count
FROM billing.invoices
WHERE status = 'paid'
GROUP BY status
